name: Disneyland
description:
Disneyland is a theme park at the Disneyland Resort in Anaheim, California, United States.  It was the first theme park opened by the Walt Disney Company and the only one designed and constructed under the direct supervision of Walt Disney, opening on July 17, 1955. 

Disney initially envisioned building a tourist attraction adjacent to his studios in Burbank to entertain fans who wished to visit; however, he soon realized that the proposed site was too small for the ideas that he had.
imageAttribution: The park's icon, Sleeping Beauty Castle, in 2024
